tool_args.label: Preliminary results subject to year-end adjustments

payload.gap_text: This report presents preliminary 2024 results that are compared to the November Forecast and are subject to change pending final year-end accounting adjustments and audit review
payload.description: All financial and ridership figures are preliminary and do not include post-close adjustments

tool_args.label: NYCT Non-Reimbursable operating results unfavorable to Forecast

payload.claim_text: December YTD Non-Reimbursable operating results were unfavorable to the Forecast by $444.6 million (0.3%)
payload.subject: NYCT

tool_args.label: Largest vacancies in Subways/Bus Maintenance

payload.claim_text: The largest number of vacancies was in Subways/Bus Maintenance (1,511 positions) and Subways/Buses Operations (189 positions). There were significant vacancies in Construction and Development (516 positions), and other administrative functions (223 positions)
payload.subject: NYCT

tool_args.label: SIR Non-Reimbursable operating results favorable to Forecast

payload.claim_text: December YTD non-reimbursable operating results were favorable to the Forecast by $10.968 million or 10.7%
payload.subject: SIR

tool_args.label: MTA Bus Non-Reimbursable operating results favorable to Forecast

payload.claim_text: Total annual Non-Reimbursable operating results were favorable to the Forecast by $164.1 million (17.4%)
payload.subject: MTA Bus Company
